title: geranium cinereum subsp. cazorlense
intro: Geranium cinereum subsp. cazorlense is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Geraniaceae, characterized by its compact growth and delicate pink flowers. It is used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Geranium cinereum subsp. cazorlense include soothing and calming effects, making it useful for treating anxiety, insomnia, and skin conditions. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used to promote relaxation and reduce inflammation.
